description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a dark gable roof and a prominent front porch supported by columns. The front facade features a covered entryway with steps leading up to the main door, flanked by windows and a garage on one side. The house has a rectangular footprint with a small wooden deck at the rear, accessible by steps. Windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and rear, with fewer and smaller windows on the sides. The exterior walls are finished in reddish-brown brick, and the roof is clad in dark shingles. The house sits on a large, flat grassy lot, providing ample space around the structure.
description: A two-story brick house with a dark gable roof, front porch, and attached garage, set on a spacious grassy lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with porch, steps, and garage on the left.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the garage, side windows, and the wooden deck extending from the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back deck, rear entry steps, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_3: Right side view with minimal windows and a clear view of the deck and side entry path.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered front porch with steps, columns, and a single main door adjacent to a garage entrance.
